MeasurementToolMetadata.Description: The Penn Computerized Neurobehavioral Battery (CNB) is an online cognitive assessment consisting of a series of tasks that measure accuracy and speed of performance in major cognitive domains.

session_id.Description: BIDS session label assigned chronologically via Flywheel created timestamp

cnb_cptnl_number_tp.LongName: CPTNL True Positive Responses for Number Trials

cnb_cptnl_number_fp.LongName: CPTNL False Positive Responses for Number Trials

cnb_cptnl_number_tn.LongName: CPTNL True Negative Responses for Number Trials

cnb_cptnl_number_fn.LongName: CPTNL False Negative Responses for Number Trials

cnb_cptnl_number_fprt.LongName: CPTNL Median Response Time for False Positive Responses for Number Trials

cnb_cptnl_letter_fn.LongName: CPTNL False Negative Responses for Letter Trials

cnb_cptnl_letter_tprt.LongName: CPTNL Median Response Time for True Positive Responses for Letter Trials

cnb_cptnl_letter_fprt.LongName: CPTNL Median Response Time for False Positive Responses for Letter Trials

cnb_cptnl_total_tprt.LongName: CPTNL Median Response Time for True Positive Number Responses and True Positive Letter Responses

cnb_cptnl_total_tprt_mean.LongName: CPTNL Mean Response Time for True Positive Responses

cnb_cptnl_total_tprt_stdev.LongName: CPTNL Standard Deviation Response Time for True Positive Responses

cnb_cptnl_letter_rt.LongName: CPTNL Median Response Time for All Letter Responses

cnb_cptnl_total_rt.LongName: CPTNL Median Response Time for All Responses

cnb_cptnl_total_rt_mean.LongName: CPTNL Mean Response Time for All Responses

cnb_cptnl_total_rt_stdev.LongName: CPTNL Standard Deviation Time for All Trial Responses

cnb_cptnl_total_lrsr.LongName: CPTNL Longest Run of Same Responses

cnb_cptnl_valid_code.LongName: Validation Code for entire Short Penn Continuous Performance Test - Number and Letter Version

Levels.F: Likely valid, problem occurred which affected performance for a limited number of responses/mild to moderate effect
